mapper.select: SELECT id, source_note_id, target_note_id, parsed_note_name, anchor, nickname, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_each_mapping WHERE source_note_id = #{sourceNoteId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, source_note_id, target_note_id, parsed_note_name, anchor, nickname, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_each_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_note_each_mapping (source_note_id, target_note_id, parsed_note_name, anchor, nickname, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{mapping.sourceNoteId}, #{mapping.targetNoteId}, #{mapping.parsedNoteName}, #{mapping.anchor}, #{mapping.nickname}, #{mapping.isPass}, #{mapping.isDeleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note_each_mapping SET target_note_id = #{targetNoteId}, is_pass = #{isPass}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_note_each_mapping SET target_note_id = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_note_each_mapping SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE source_note_id = #{sourceNoteId} AND is_deleted = 0
